title: Rounds Ru
description: Who knows the Rounds In Minecraft map? Do you want it to be in Russian? This resource pack is your solution, it transfers all bonuses!
body:
## 📖 What's this Resource pack
  This resource pack translates bonuses into Russian for the Rounds In Minecraft map.

  It replaces 46 bonus cards with English text into Russian.
## What is this Resource Pack for?
- For a convenient game on the map 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

https://minecraft-inside.ru/maps/169501-rounds-in-minecraft.html

</details>

![Bonus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sEi2ursx/images/58b93c2102cd7dd13502c79405fa540eb0aae2f8.png)
## ⚙️How do I add a resource pack to the game?
1.Download this resource Pack.

2.Open the .minecraft
folder.

3. In it, open the resourcepack folder.
4. And move th Rounds_ru
## ⚙️Activation in the game. 
- Go to settings, then resource sets and activate Rounds_ru
